headline: Assessing Linde (LIN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Softness And Modest Undervaluation Signals
summary: Linde: recent performance snapshot Linde (LIN) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$493.85. Short term moves include a 1.6% decline over the past day and a 1.5% decline over the past week. Over longer periods, Linde shows a 0.1% decline over the past month, alongside gains of 10.2% over the past 3 months, 15.1% year to date and 10.4% over the past year on a total return basis. headline: BMO Capital Stays Bullish on Linde (LIN) as RBC Capital Sees Room for Guidance Upside
summary: With a YTD Return of 15.65% as of May 7, Linde plc (NASDAQ:LIN) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy to Beat the S&P 500.
